summary: Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building production web and mobile applications, with a backend-leaning focus on Node.js and NestJS. Experienced designing and implementing APIs, backend services, and microservices architectures, alongside frontend work in React and Next.js. Comfortable in Linux and Docker environments. Focused on delivering scalable, maintainable code and collaborating effectively in remote-first teams. Experienced with AI-assisted development workflows and long-term product engagements.

bullets: Studied cloud-native distributed systems, Docker-based infrastructure, observability principles, and resilience patterns.
Deepened understanding of Test-Driven Development (TDD) and Spec-Driven Development (SDD) — focusing on AI-assisted SDLC workflows anchored to acceptance criteria.
Explored and applied AI-powered development workflows to improve engineering productivity and code quality.
Worked on personal projects to strengthen backend architecture and system design skills.
Built and maintained features in a NestJS-based microservices backend, implementing scalable and maintainable modules with a focus on reliability and performance.
Developed and maintained RESTful APIs and backend integrations, ensuring data correctness and service interoperability.
Participated in technical discussions around system design and contributed to implementation decisions across the stack.
Contributed to technical backlog refinement, translating business requirements into clear technical specifications.
Worked across frontend in React Native (Mobile) and Next.js (Web), maintaining production applications used by real users.
Implemented unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress.
Maintained a TypeScript codebase with a strong emphasis on code quality, readability, and long-term maintainability.
Developed and maintained RESTful APIs in Node.js, documenting endpoints with Swagger to ensure clear contract definition.
Integrated third-party and internal APIs with advanced request management strategies, including request cancellation to prevent race conditions.
Designed and delivered real-time communication features using Socket.IO, enabling low-latency bidirectional messaging in production.
Maintained and evolved front-end applications built with React, Redux, TypeScript, and Styled-Components.
Implemented unit tests using Jest and React Testing Library, improving code reliability and reducing regressions.
Built and maintained React and Next.js applications deployed on AWS S3, contributing to CI/CD and release processes.
Implemented new features based on product requirements, translating business needs into maintainable technical solutions.
Enhanced the company's Design System with Storybook Controls, improving component discoverability and cross-squad adoption.
Mentored new engineers on code quality, testing practices, and front-end architecture.
Implemented unit tests with Jest and React Testing Library.
Shipped and maintained a production mobile application (iOS and Android) using React Native.
Contributed to the successful MVP launch, collaborating cross-functionally to ensure timely delivery and production readiness.
Managed cart and order state flows using Redux, integrating with backend APIs for live data.
Worked in parallel on a next-generation app version using Flutter and Dart, applying the Repository Pattern for testability.
Contributed to the early-stage development of a SaaS platform enabling clients to manage and track marketing leads via a dashboard.
Modeled and implemented digital products using JavaScript (ES6+), React, and Node.js.
Integrated third-party APIs to collect and process data from marketing campaigns.
Collaborated with the Product team to gather requirements and translate them into technical specifications.
Developed a new event scheduling module within a monolithic MVC architecture using Laravel (PHP) and JavaScript.
Modeled relational database schemas with normalization techniques (1NF–3NF) to ensure data integrity.
Designed and implemented user-friendly interfaces with a focus on usability and accessibility.

bullets: Focusing on Computer Software Engineering
